enrichment.summary: Kyle, while notably high on edibles, responds to a viewer request to share his thoughts on the James Bond film series. He covers his favorite films (For Your Eyes Only, Moonraker, The Spy Who Loved Me), ranks the actors, and reflects on what makes James Bond cool as a character.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: For Your Eyes Only is his all-time favorite, followed by Moonraker and The Spy Who Loved Me
Roger Moore is his favorite for perfectly embodying cool-under-pressure calm; Daniel Craig is second and arguably the best overall for realism and fitness
Perfect look but became too old and cheesy over time; lacked Roger Moore's unflappable cool
Dislikes the recurring trope of Bond getting caught — it makes the hero look like an idiot; wants the formula to evolve
Likes Craig but wants more payoff in action scenes; frustrated when big action sequences lead to Bond failing
